name: Black Panther
description: T'Challa, son of T'Chaka, is the King of Wakanda and the Black Panther, a title passed through generations of Wakandan warriors who consume the Heart-Shaped Herb to gain enhanced abilities. Wakanda, hidden from the world for centuries, possesses the most advanced technology on Earth thanks to its vibranium reserves. T'Challa balances his duties as monarch, warrior, and Avenger, navigating the tension between isolationism and global responsibility. His intelligence, combat prowess, and diplomatic wisdom make him one of Marvel's most complete heroes.
